valid.code:
import "codemirror/addon/fold/brace-fold"
import "codemirror/addon/edit/closebrackets"
import "codemirror/addon/fold/foldgutter"
import "codemirror/addon/fold/foldgutter.css"
import "codemirror/addon/lint/json-lint"
import "codemirror/addon/lint/lint"
import "codemirror/addon/lint/lint.css"
import "codemirror/addon/scroll/simplescrollbars"
import "codemirror/addon/scroll/simplescrollbars.css"
import "codemirror/lib/codemirror.css"
import "codemirror/mode/javascript/javascript"

import x1 from "a";
import x2 from "b"
import { a, type b, c, type d } from "a"
import { a, typeof b, c, typeof d } from "a"
import { type a, typeof b, c } from "a"

import type x1 from "a";
import type x2 from "b"

invalid.code:
import x2 from "b"
import x1 from "a";
invalid.output:
import x1 from "a";
import x2 from "b"

invalid.code:
import x2 from "b"
import x1 from "a"

;[].forEach()
invalid.output:
import x1 from "a"
import x2 from "b"

;[].forEach()

invalid.code:
import x2 from "b"
import x1 from "a" // a

;/* comment */[].forEach()
invalid.output:
import x1 from "a" // a
import x2 from "b"

;/* comment */[].forEach()

invalid.code: import { e, b, a as c } from "specifiers"
invalid.output: import { a as c,b, e } from "specifiers"

invalid.code: import d, { e, b, a as c } from "specifiers-default"
invalid.output: import d, { a as c,b, e } from "specifiers-default"

invalid.code: import d, { e, b, a as c, } from "specifiers-trailing-comma"
invalid.output: import d, { a as c,b, e,  } from "specifiers-trailing-comma"

invalid.code: import { a as c, a as b2, b, a } from "specifiers-renames"
invalid.output: import { a,a as b2, a as c, b } from "specifiers-renames"

invalid.code:
import {
  B,
  a,
  A,
  b,
  B2,
  bb,
  BB,
  bB,
  Bb,
  ab,
  ba,
  Ba,
  BA,
  bA,
  x as d,
  x as C,
  img10,
  img2,
  img1,
  img10_black,
} from "specifiers-human-sort"
invalid.output:
import {
  A,
  a,
  ab,
  B,
  b,
  B2,
  BA,
  Ba,
  bA,
  ba,
  BB,
  Bb,
  bB,
  bb,
  img1,
  img2,
  img10,
  img10_black,
  x as C,
  x as d,
} from "specifiers-human-sort"

invalid.code: import { aaNotKeyword, zzNotKeyword, abstract, as, asserts, any, async, /*await,*/ boolean, constructor, declare, get, infer, is, keyof, module, namespace, never, readonly, require, number, object, set, string, symbol, type, undefined, unique, unknown, from, global, bigint, of } from 'keyword-identifiers';
invalid.output: import { aaNotKeyword, abstract, any, as, asserts, async, /*await,*/ bigint, boolean, constructor, declare, from, get, global, infer, is, keyof, module, namespace, never, number, object, of,readonly, require, set, string, symbol, type, undefined, unique, unknown, zzNotKeyword } from 'keyword-identifiers';

invalid.code: import {e,b,a as c} from "specifiers-no-spaces"
invalid.output: import {a as c,b,e} from "specifiers-no-spaces"

invalid.code: import { b,a} from "specifiers-no-space-before"
invalid.output: import { a,b} from "specifiers-no-space-before"

invalid.code: import {b,a } from "specifiers-no-space-after"
invalid.output: import {a,b } from "specifiers-no-space-after"

invalid.code: import {b,a, } from "specifiers-no-space-after-trailing"
invalid.output: import {a,b, } from "specifiers-no-space-after-trailing"

invalid.code: import { b /* b */, a } from "specifiers-comment-between"
invalid.output: import { a,b /* b */ } from "specifiers-comment-between"

invalid.code:
import {
  b,
  a /*
  after */ } from "specifiers-multiline-end-comment-no-newline"

import {z, y,
  x,

w,
    v
  as /*v*/

    u , t /*t*/, // t
    s
} from "specifiers-inline-multiline"
invalid.output:
import {    s,
t /*t*/, // t
    v
  as /*v*/
    u , w,
  x,
y,
z} from "specifiers-inline-multiline"

invalid.code:
import b from "b"; // b
import a from "a"; code();

import b from "b"; // b
import a from "a"; /*
after */

import b from "b"; // b
import a from "a"; /* a */
invalid.output:
import a from "a"; /* a */
import b from "b"; // b
